title: Open the System Metrics Pop-Up From the Overall System Aveva API Page
summary: Open the Overall System Aveva API page, use the Get metrics control, and review the resulting pop-up that displays system metrics.
when_to_use: Use when support personnel need to display system metrics from the Overall System Aveva API page for review.
not_for: Do not use this runbook as a guide for interpreting specific metric fields or acceptable metric values; the source does not provide that detail.
Do not use this runbook for opening current errors; the source identifies Get errors as a separate pop-up control.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the Overall System Aveva API page, select Get metrics, and review the displayed metrics pop-up.

safety_notes: The source presents this as a support-safe page interaction.
No production stop or lockout/tagout requirement is stated in the source for opening the metrics pop-up.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Overall System Aveva API page

access_required: Access to the Overall System Aveva API page
system_preconditions: The Overall System Aveva API page is available to open.

visual_references.description: Training video frame showing the Overall System Aveva API page with the Get metrics entry and related controls.

steps.title: Open the Overall System Aveva API page
steps.purpose: Navigate to the page that contains the Get metrics control.
steps.instruction: Open the Overall System Aveva API page.
steps.expected_result: The Overall System Aveva API page is displayed.
steps.healthy_condition: The page shows the available controls, including Get metrics.
steps.failure_condition: The Overall System Aveva API page does not open or the expected controls are not visible.

actions.label: Open API page
actions.exact_action: Open the Overall System Aveva API page.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall System Aveva API page with the Get metrics entry visible among the page options.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the Overall System Aveva API page cannot be opened.
Stop or escalate if the Get metrics control is not visible on the page.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The training segment discusses the Overall System Aveva API page and its controls, including Get metrics.
The artifact shows the Overall System Aveva API page with options including Get metrics.

steps.title: Locate the Get metrics control
steps.purpose: Identify the specific page control used to open the metrics pop-up.
steps.instruction: On the Overall System Aveva API page, locate the Get metrics control.
steps.expected_result: The Get metrics control is identified on the page.
steps.healthy_condition: Get metrics is visible as one of the page options.
steps.failure_condition: The Get metrics control cannot be found on the page.

actions.label: Find Get metrics
actions.exact_action: Locate the Get metrics control on the page.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Get metrics option listed with other Overall System Aveva API page controls such as Reset Metrics, Zone configuration, and Get errors.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the page is open but the Get metrics control is missing.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Overall System Aveva API page shows Reset Metrics, Reset Tipper Stats, Bag Out control, Get metrics, Zone configuration, and Get errors.
The Overall System Aveva API page includes controls and pop-up links for metrics, tipper stats, bag out control, zone configuration, and current errors.

steps.title: Select Get metrics
steps.purpose: Trigger the system metrics pop-up from the page.
steps.instruction: Select Get metrics to open the metrics pop-up.
steps.expected_result: A pop-up opens showing system metrics.
steps.healthy_condition: Selecting Get metrics causes the metrics page or pop-up to appear.
steps.failure_condition: No metrics pop-up appears after selecting Get metrics.

actions.label: Open metrics pop-up
actions.exact_action: Select Get metrics to open the metrics pop-up.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Get metrics control used to open the metrics page or pop-up.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the metrics pop-up does not appear.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Get metrics gets all the system metrics and pops it up.
Get metrics on the Overall System Aveva API page opens a pop-up with all system metrics.

steps.title: Review the displayed system metrics
steps.purpose: Confirm that the metrics pop-up opened and that system metrics are available for review.
steps.instruction: Review the displayed system metrics in the pop-up window.
steps.expected_result: The pop-up displays all system metrics for review.
steps.healthy_condition: A metrics pop-up is visible and contains system metrics.
steps.failure_condition: The pop-up is blank, does not show system metrics, or the source-required review details are unavailable.

actions.label: Review metrics pop-up
actions.exact_action: Review the displayed system metrics in the pop-up window.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the metrics pop-up does not appear.
Escalate or seek SME guidance if specific metric fields or expected values are needed, because the source does not document them.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Get metrics gets all the system metrics and pops it up.
The source does not document which specific metric fields should be reviewed in the pop-up.

success_criteria: The Overall System Aveva API page is opened.
The Get metrics control is located.
Selecting Get metrics opens a pop-up.
healthy_conditions: The Overall System Aveva API page shows the Get metrics control.
Get metrics opens a pop-up as described in the source.
The pop-up shows system metrics for review.
failure_conditions: The Overall System Aveva API page cannot be opened.
The Get metrics control cannot be located.
The metrics pop-up does not appear.
The source does not provide specific metric fields or expected values for detailed validation.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the metrics pop-up does not appear after selecting Get metrics.
Escalate to an SME if interpretation of specific metric fields or expected values is required, because the source does not provide that detail.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall System Aveva API page showing the Get metrics control.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Get metrics gets all the system metrics and pops it up; Get errors is a pop up as well and OCR says it pops up the current errors.

missing_details: The source does not specify navigation steps for reaching the Overall System Aveva API page.
The source does not identify which specific metric fields appear in the pop-up.
The source does not provide expected metric values, thresholds, or pass/fail criteria for the displayed metrics.
The source does not provide a time estimate for completing this procedure.
